emails.subject: Re: Matching gift
emails.body: Re: Matching gift I talked to Vanessa Bob at x36781 regarding this matter. She said she's forwarded this on to the JK Group which will pay the amount shortly. The matching gifts are paid quarterly. Kay Mann@ENRON 05/22/2001 01:55 PM

emails.subject: Re: Matching gift
emails.body: Well, that's something I hadn't heard before. They should let that be known, don't you think? At least now WE know it! Kay From: Suzanne Adams@ECT on 05/29/2001 10:56 AM

emails.body: Really! I hate not having information. Kay Mann@ENRON 05/29/2001 10:57 AM
